{"success":true,"data":{"EngagementId":12,"EngagementName":"API Discovery & Security Evaluation","ClientName":"testing-CRVM","Mode":"passive","ScanTargetEnvironment":"internal_non_prod","SchemaVersion":null,"GeneratedAt":null,"StartedAt":"2026-03-23T05:36:44.000Z","CompletedAt":"2026-03-24T23:08:53.000Z","OverallRisk":"CRITICAL","Narrative":"The API Discovery and Security Evaluation engagement for testing-CRVM identified 503 inbound APIs that CRVM exposes, and 24 outbound API dependencies that CRVM calls. None of the 503 inbound endpoints were present in a formal API registry or OpenAPI specification, resulting in all being classified as Shadow APIs — indicating a complete absence of API governance controls. 1 inbound endpoints handle CRITICAL sensitivity data and 494 carry High or Critical risk scores. Static analysis revealed 46 hardcoded credential findings including tokens, private keys, and environment variables. CRVM makes outbound calls to 24 external and internal APIs (4 external), none of which have been formally assessed for security. 485 inbound endpoints show no detectable authentication mechanism. The overall security posture for API governance is assessed as: CRITICAL.","TotalApis":512,"InboundApiCount":512,"OutboundApiCount":33,"OutboundExternalCount":4,"OutboundInternalCount":20,"ValidCount":0,"ShadowCount":512,"NewCount":0,"RogueCount":0,"UnclassifiedCount":0,"SecretsCount":55,"OWASPFindingsTotal":1136,"InferredOWASPFindings":1122,"LiveOWASPFindings":5,"CVEFindingsTotal":10,"HighCriticalRiskCount":494,"EndpointsWithoutAuth":485,"ExternalIntegrations":1,"SensitivityCritical":1,"SensitivityHigh":36,"SensitivityMedium":114,"SensitivityLow":352,"SensitivityUnknown":0,"TechStackRuntime":"Node.js","TechStackLanguage":"JavaScript/TypeScript","TechStackFramework":"Express.js","TechStackFrontend":"Unknown"},"error":null,"totalCount":1,"payloadCount":1}

{"success":true,"data":{"EngagementId":12,"EngagementName":"API Discovery & Security Evaluation","ClientName":"testing-CRVM","OverallRisk":"CRITICAL","Narrative":"The API Discovery and Security Evaluation engagement for testing-CRVM identified 503 inbound APIs that CRVM exposes, and 24 outbound API dependencies that CRVM calls. None of the 503 inbound endpoints were present in a formal API registry or OpenAPI specification, resulting in all being classified as Shadow APIs — indicating a complete absence of API governance controls. 1 inbound endpoints handle CRITICAL sensitivity data and 494 carry High or Critical risk scores. Static analysis revealed 46 hardcoded credential findings including tokens, private keys, and environment variables. CRVM makes outbound calls to 24 external and internal APIs (4 external), none of which have been formally assessed for security. 485 inbound endpoints show no detectable authentication mechanism.
